description: Markdown WYSIWYG editor with Word-like collaboration features

tasks.name: KaTeX inline/block WYSIWYG editing
tasks.notes: Double-click opens KatexEditDialog with live KaTeX preview. Saves via setNodeMarkup.

tasks.name: Mermaid diagram WYSIWYG editing
tasks.notes: Double-click opens MermaidEditDialog with side-by-side live preview. Saves via setNodeMarkup.

tasks.name: Image resize UI and alt-text editing
tasks.notes: Double-click opens ImageEditDialog: edit URL, alt text, and width (presets: 25/50/75/100% or custom). Width serialized as HTML tag for round-tripping. Toolbar link/image insert buttons now use proper React dialogs (window.prompt removed).

tasks.name: Table editing
tasks.notes: TableBubbleMenu floats when cursor is in a table: insert/delete/move columns and rows, delete table. Uses prosemirror-tables moveTableColumn/moveTableRow.

tasks.name: Broken local images
tasks.notes: Images with relative file paths don't resolve because renderer base URL is the Vite dev server, not the file directory. Fix requires a custom protocol handler or path rewriting in the main process.

tasks.name: Fix highlight offset tracking
tasks.notes: Marks serialize as <span data-markov='hl' data-comment-id='...'> inline HTML (not HTML comments). Vite HMR watch excludes .md files to prevent page reload on save.

tasks.name: Comment metadata round-tripping via codec
tasks.notes: Inline highlight markers survive round-trip. Comment thread metadata appended as markover:comment blocks at end of file.

tasks.name: Replace window.prompt with inline dialog
tasks.notes: window.prompt() was unreliable in Electron. Replaced with a React modal that preserves editor selection.

tasks.name: Deletion tracking in plugin
tasks.notes: Plugin reads deleted text from oldState and re-inserts with markovDelete mark.

tasks.name: Track change marks serialized to markdown
tasks.notes: Serializer emits <span data-markov='ins/del' ...> spans. Avoids <ins>/<del> which conflicted with TipTap's Strike extension.

tasks.name: Track change marks parsed from markdown
tasks.notes: span[data-markov='ins/del'] parseHTML rules with priority:110. Backwards-compatible rules for old ins/del format.

tasks.name: Accept/reject functionality
tasks.notes: Accept insertion keeps text, accept deletion removes it. Reject insertion removes text, reject deletion keeps it.

tasks.name: Group consecutive insertions into one tracked change
tasks.notes: Plugin reuses changeId when typed characters are adjacent (lastInsertEnd === newStart). Resets on cursor move or deletion.

tasks.name: Fix TipTap extension.storage getter bug
tasks.notes: TipTap 3's extension.storage getter returns a new copy on every access. Plugin now reads/writes via editor.storage[extensionName] (persistent extensionStorage).

tasks.name: cspell exception support in markdown
tasks.notes: Requirement: user can place cspell exception comment in markdown to override spelling. Not implemented.

tasks.name: Publish: export clean markdown without markover metadata
tasks.notes: File > Publish (Ctrl+Shift+P) saves plain markdown to a new file. Uses parseMarkoverFile to strip comment blocks, then regex to accept all track changes (ins=keep, del=remove) and remove comment highlights.

tasks.name: General-purpose text highlighting
tasks.notes: TipTap Highlight extension. Serializes as <mark> (not ==...==) so round-trip works through markdown-it.

tasks.name: Toolbar button for standalone highlighting
tasks.notes: Highlighter icon in toolbar applies the highlight mark.

tasks.name: E2E tests for core editing features
E2E tests for file save/load round-tripping
Toggle between WYSIWYG and raw markdown editing
tasks.notes: FileCode button in toolbar. Switches on toggle; syncs content both ways via getMarkdown()/loadContent().

tasks.name: Syntax-highlighted raw editor (CodeMirror 6)
tasks.notes: Uses @uiw/react-codemirror with @codemirror/lang-markdown. One Dark theme in dark mode.

tasks.name: Toolbar/status bar indicator for current mode
tasks.notes: FileCode button shows active state; status bar shows 'Raw Mode' in purple.

tasks.name: Theme store and system preference detection
Dark mode CSS variables and Tailwind dark classes
Theme toggle in toolbar or menu
User guide content (features, usage, shortcuts)
tasks.notes: HelpDialog covers all features: file ops, formatting shortcuts, comments, track changes, KaTeX, Mermaid, tables, images, file format.

tasks.name: In-app help or bundled guide
tasks.notes: F1 or Help > User Guide opens the HelpDialog. Searchable. Also added Collaborate menu (Add Comment, Toggle Track Changes) and Help menu to native menu bar.
